rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one claim (the Rubin alert volume and latency target) but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
